case_title: CHAVEZ, JOSE et al VS TORRES, JOSE R. GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL TO JOSE R.TORRES GONZALEZ RETURNED SIGNED;
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, JOSE CHAVEZ, NURIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, JOSE R.
